queries.description: Block device mappings for Launch Configurations and EC2 instances should mandate encryption of all attached EBS volumes to safeguard sensitive data. This is achieved by specifying the 'encrypted' parameter with a value of 'true' for each volume.

files.expected_value: aws_instance[node].root_block_device.encrypted should be set
aws_instance[registry].root_block_device.encrypted should be set
aws_instance[nat].root_block_device.encrypted should be set

queries.description: AWS DB Instance should have its storage encrypted by setting the parameter to 'true'. The storage_encrypted default value is 'false'.

files.expected_value: 'storage_encrypted' should be set to true

queries.query_name: Sensitive Port Is Exposed To Entire Network
queries.description: A sensitive port, such as port 23 or port 110, is open for the whole network in either TCP or UDP protocol

files.expected_value: SSH (TCP:22) should not be allowed
HTTPS (TCP:443) should not be allowed
HTTP (TCP:80) should not be allowed

queries.description: Security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 and/or ::/0

files.expected_value: aws_security_group[nat].ingress.cidr_blocks should not contain '0.0.0.0/0'
aws_security_group[web].ingress[1].cidr_blocks should not contain '0.0.0.0/0'
aws_security_group[web].ingress[0].cidr_blocks should not contain '0.0.0.0/0'

queries.description: Check if CloudWatch logging is disabled for Route53 hosted zones

files.expected_value: 'aws_route53_query_log' should be set for respective 'aws_route53_zone'

queries.description: EC2 Instance should not have a public IP address.

files.expected_value: 'associate_public_ip_address' should be defined and not null
'associate_public_ip_address' should be defined and not null
'associate_public_ip_address' should be defined and not null

queries.description: EC2 Instance should have detailed monitoring enabled. With detailed monitoring enabled data is available in 1-minute periods

files.expected_value: 'monitoring' should be defined and not null
'monitoring' should be defined and not null
'monitoring' should be defined and not null

queries.query_name: EC2 Instance Using Default Security Group
queries.description: EC2 instances should not use default security group(s)

files.expected_value: aws_instance[registry].vpc_security_group_ids should not be using default security group
files.actual_value: aws_instance[registry].vpc_security_group_ids is using at least one default security group

files.expected_value: aws_instance[node].vpc_security_group_ids should not be using default security group
files.actual_value: aws_instance[node].vpc_security_group_ids is using at least one default security group

queries.description: ELB should have logging enabled to help on error investigation

files.expected_value: 'aws_elb[{{nginx_proxy}}].access_logs' should be defined and not null

queries.description: The HTTP port is open to the internet in a Security Group

files.expected_value: aws_security_group[web].ingress[0] should not open the HTTP port (80)

queries.description: IAM Database Auth Enabled should be configured to true when using compatible engine and version

files.expected_value: 'iam_database_authentication_enabled' should be set to true

queries.description: RDS does not have any kind of logger

files.expected_value: 'enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports' should be defined

queries.description: Server Access Logging should be enabled on S3 Buckets so that all changes are logged and trackable

files.expected_value: 'logging' should be defined and not null

queries.description: S3 bucket should have versioning enabled

files.expected_value: 'versioning' should be true

queries.query_name: Security Group With Unrestricted Access To SSH
queries.description: 'SSH' (TCP:22) should not be public in AWS Security Group

files.expected_value: aws_security_group[nat].ingress 'SSH' (Port:22) should not be open

queries.description: Every VPC resource should have an associated Flow Log

files.expected_value: aws_vpc[default] should be the same as Flow Logs VPC id
files.actual_value: aws_vpc[default] is not the same as Flow Logs VPC id

queries.description: VPC Subnet should not assign public IP

files.expected_value: aws_subnet[public].map_public_ip_on_launch should be set to false or undefined

queries.description: VPC should have a Network Firewall associated

files.expected_value: aws_vpc[default] has an 'aws_networkfirewall_firewall' associated
files.actual_value: aws_vpc[default] does not have an 'aws_networkfirewall_firewall' associated

queries.description: EC2 Instances should not be configured under a default VPC network

files.expected_value: aws_instance[nat].subnet_id should not be associated with a default VPC
files.actual_value: aws_instance[nat].subnet_id is associated with a default VPC

queries.description: Instance metadata can be accessed with both IMDSv1 or IMDSv2. Although, IMDSv2 service is a session-oriented service, granting additional protection against exposure of metadata information. That version should be used instead of IMDSv1 in order to mitigate those situations.

files.expected_value: 'aws_instance[nat].metadata_options' should be defined with 'http_tokens' field set to 'required'
'aws_instance[registry].metadata_options' should be defined with 'http_tokens' field set to 'required'
'aws_instance[node].metadata_options' should be defined with 'http_tokens' field set to 'required'

queries.description: AWS Shield Advanced should be used for Amazon Route 53 hosted zone, AWS Global Accelerator accelerator, Elastic IP Address, Elastic Load Balancing, and Amazon CloudFront Distribution to protect these resources against robust DDoS attacks

files.expected_value: aws_route53_zone has shield advanced associated
files.actual_value: aws_route53_zone does not have shield advanced associated

queries.query_name: Tags Not Copied to RDS Cluster Snapshot
queries.description: Tags of the RDS Cluster should be copied to the respective snapshots to ensure that snapshots retain important metadata for identification, cost allocation, and resource management

files.expected_value: 'aws_db_instance[default].copy_tags_to_snapshot' should be defined to true

queries.description: It's considered a best practice for an EC2 instance to use an EBS optimized instance. This provides the best performance for your EBS volumes by minimizing contention between Amazon EBS I/O and other traffic from your instance

files.expected_value: 'ebs_optimized' should be set to true
'ebs_optimized' should be set to true
'ebs_optimized' should be set to true
